AI & Automation

CTO Advisory

Work we've shipped

PHP · HubSpot · RPA

Cocktail Holidays

Full digital transformation for a travel operator — booking automation, CRM integration, and RPA workflows that cut manual admin by 60%.

View case →
WordPress · PHP · WooCommerce · HubSpot

Agri Novatex

React distributor portal with a Node.js API layer connecting HubSpot CRM to IoT sensor networks across South Africa and the UK. Automated stock-level alerts, order workflows, and real-time field data dashboards replaced a fully manual distributor communication process.

View case →
Flutter · Firebase · iOS · Android

Ranjet

Native iOS (Swift) and Android (Kotlin) apps backed by a Node.js/Express API with PostgreSQL. Real-time GPS tracking, automated dispatch logic, and driver performance dashboards — shipped from spec to App Store in 14 weeks.

View case →
React · Node.js · MongoDB · Marketplace

Skipodium

Next.js multi-vendor marketplace with Stripe Payments, a custom search and filter engine, and a Node.js/Express API. Automated booking confirmation, supplier dashboards, and a headless CMS — handling 300+ active listings at peak with sub-200ms page loads.

View case →
WooCommerce · MQTT · Node.js

Novatex Italia

WooCommerce e-commerce platform with custom IoT data ingestion via MQTT/Node.js, automated distributor portal, and real-time inventory sync across 50+ regional distributors. Order-to-dispatch automation cut fulfilment lead time by 40%.

View case →
React · Node.js · MQTT

HayGuard

React dashboard consuming IoT sensor data over MQTT via a Node.js backend. Threshold-triggered SMS/email alerts, multi-farm team management, and historical trend charts — deployed live across 12 farms at launch with zero manual monitoring required.

View case →
Agriculture · PHP · Distribution

Sidagricrop

Full digital platform for an agricultural distributor — a reseller distribution system managing orders and inventory across the network, plus a bespoke netwrap calculator built in PHP. Live at sidagricrop.it.

PHPMySQLWooCommerceCustom Portal
View case →
Professional Services · PHP · Configurator

Deigma

Custom system configurator built in PHP — allows clients to interactively build and price complex service configurations in real time. Live at deigma.it/system-configurator.

PHPJavaScriptMySQLUX
View case →
Agriculture · WordPress · CRM

Committedag

WordPress platform for an agricultural commodities business — CRM integration, automated buyer communications, and real-time inventory management. Live at committedag.com.

WordPressWooCommerceHubSpotAPI
View case →
Agriculture · SaaS · Calculator

Novatex Bale Wrap Calculator

The largest database of bale wrapper specifications worldwide — recommends the correct Novatex netwrap for any machine and calculates precise utilisation metrics. Used by distributors across Europe and Africa.

ReactNode.jsPostgreSQLData
View case →

Meridian Realty Group

GulfNest Developments

Investor relations portal and automated reporting system — monthly statements, occupancy dashboards, and document generation all automated for a portfolio of 200+ units.

ReactNode.jsPostgreSQLPDF generation

Fintech · SaaS · Mobile

ClearLedger

Cross-border payment tracking and reconciliation SaaS — real-time transaction visibility, automated matching, and compliance reporting for SMEs operating across GCC and Europe.

Sectors we serve
Real estate

Brokerages & developers

Lead routing, CRM automation, AI follow-up, and document processing — from first enquiry to signed contract.

Explore →
Travel & hospitality

Tour operators & hotels

Booking automation, AI itinerary generation, agency back-office workflows, and supplier integrations — built for tour operators and travel agencies that need their systems to talk to each other.

Explore →
Agriculture

Agri businesses & distributors

IoT sensor monitoring, automated alerts, distributor portals, and inventory tracking — field to office, connected.

Explore →
Media & publishing

Agencies & content platforms

Content workflows, asset management, automated distribution, and performance reporting — built for teams that move fast.

Explore →
Professional services

Consultancies & service firms

Invoice automation, KPI dashboards, client onboarding, and reporting — your admin runs itself so your team focuses on delivery.

Explore →
E-commerce & retail

Online stores & brands

Order management, returns automation, catalogue sync, and customer communication — at scale, without extra headcount.

Explore →
How we work

From first call to live system — in weeks, not months

We work in tight, outcome-focused sprints with fixed-price proposals and clear deliverables at each step. No bloated retainers. No surprises.

Automation audit

We map your current workflows, find where time is lost, and quantify the impact. Free for qualified leads — no commitment required.

1–2 days
Free Estimate

What could automation
save your team?

Your sector
About your business
Monthly revenue$45K
Your organisation's total monthly revenue.
Team size12 people
Number of full-time employees.
Manual work share40%
Approximate % of the team's time spent on manual, repeatable tasks.
About your leads
Monthly inbound leads150
Enquiries, sign-ups, or new leads received per month.
Current lead response time
Your profile

A 12-person real estate operation generating around $45K/month — we know this profile well. The biggest time sink is usually lead follow-up and CRM hygiene. At 4–24 hours response times, you're likely losing warm leads to faster competitors. Our typical engagement for a brokerage your size starts with automating lead capture and WhatsApp follow-up, then moves into CRM sync and pipeline reporting. Most clients in this bracket see their admin load drop within the first 30 days.

Cumulative benefit — working with Tergo
Cost savings
Revenue potential
Total cost savings (M12)
$15K
cost savings (M12)
Total combined benefit (M12)
$35K
combined (M12)
Hours recovered
673 hrs
hours back per year
Estimated payback
6.5 mos
to recover investment

These figures are best-case scenario estimates based on industry-average automation yields and typical team structures. Actual results depend on workflow complexity, data quality, and implementation scope. We recommend a discovery call before drawing conclusions from this calculator.

What clients say

Trusted by operators across Europe and the GCC

“

We cooperated with Tergo Media since 2019 on digital transformation, software development and RPA. Always on time and optimised budget.

Fausto Migliori
Managing Director · Future Days, Milan
“

The automation they built handles 80% of our lead follow-up without anyone touching it. Response times went from hours to under a minute.

Ahmed Al Mansoori
Senior Partner · Apex Properties, Dubai
“

We went from 6-hour manual reports to automated dashboards in two weeks. The team is sharp, fast, and they genuinely understand the business.

Luca Benedetti
Operations Director · Italo Travel Group, Rome
“

Francesco and his team understood what we needed faster than any agency I've worked with. The result was exactly what we wanted, delivered ahead of schedule.

Ravi Sharma
Founder · Stacklane, Dubai
“

Tergo built our entire operations portal in six weeks. Solid architecture, clean code, and they actually pushed back when our brief had gaps — that's rare.

Domenico Castagna
CEO · Novatex Italia SpA, Milan

The team behind it

People who've built it,
not just advised on it.

We've been inside the companies — running teams, shipping product, and dealing with the same operational messiness our clients face. That's the difference.

CEOBusiness DevelopmentGCC
Maria
Commercial leadership · GCC markets

Maria leads the commercial side of Tergo Media — from business development across the GCC to the operational structure that keeps us delivering at scale. With over a decade in product management, marketing, and international business development, she brings strategic clarity and genuine relationship-building to every client engagement.

Business DevelopmentStrategic PlanningGCC MarketsTeam LeadershipProcess Optimisation
LinkedIn →
Co-founderCTOFull-Stack
Francesco
Technical core · Systems architecture

Francesco is the technical core of Tergo Media — designing the systems, writing the code, and making sure what we promise actually ships. With 10+ years across CTO roles and hands-on development in JavaScript, Node.js, Python, and React, he covers everything from AI pipelines and IoT platforms to SaaS architecture and automation systems.

Node.jsReactPythonAI & AutomationSystem Architecture
LinkedIn →

Between the two: commercial leadership and deep technical execution — across Europe and the GCC.
